data.notes:
Category: Grenades

Anything flammable within the bomb 's burst area catches fire. Treat as a flamethrower attack that lasts 20 turns or until the burning chemical is removed from contact (2d10 damage/Penetration 1 per turn). Napalm: Jellied gasoline on fire, this is the most hideous bomb weapon. Anyone or any­ thing caught in the burst area is covered in napalm, and sustains a Penetration 3 hit every turn for 20 turns. The stuff burns in water, too, so immersion is no help. Only sealed armor pro­ vides any protection from this attack. LA5ER5 Vehicular lasers are primarily restricted to space warefare. Inside the atmosphere, rail­ guns and electrothermal-enhanced weapons have the lion's share of developmental funds. At the moment, the only viable battlefield laser weapon is the Painting Laser, used to guide laser-guided weaponry. It can be blocked by anti-laser aerosols and smoke. HVY or RIF +3 N P No Damage (looking directly into it has a 90% chance of blinding; biological eyes are perma­ nently blinded!) - 1 VR 1,000 euro. ■ REL COST SPACES VR 250 1 VR 450 1 VR 500 2 VR 600 3 VR 700 4 VR 1000 5 VR 1500 6 "Nice shot.
